scripts.migrate:local: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.migrate:staging: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graph-meta-staging --env staging --remote
scripts.migrate:prod: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graphs-prod --env prod --remote
scripts.deploy-sync-prod: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && yarn clean && yarn release && yarn sentry:sourcemaps && cd ./worker && wrangler deploy --env prod
scripts.deploy-sync-staging: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && yarn clean && yarn release && yarn sentry:sourcemaps && cd ./worker && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy-agents-prod: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && yarn clean && clojure -M:cljs release agents-worker && yarn sentry:sourcemaps:agents && cd ./worker && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.agents.toml --env prod
scripts.deploy-agents-staging: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && yarn clean && clojure -M:cljs release agents-worker && yarn sentry:sourcemaps:agents && cd ./worker && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.agents.toml --env staging
